prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第53名，较2025年（56名）小幅上升，近年排名稳定在46–58区间；2026年声誉评价 偏正面，主要源于81岁博士在华师毕业等正面事件；抖音热度排名第89位（一般），未见明显投档断档记录；教育学A+（全国顶尖）、中国史A-、心理学A-、政 治学A-、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出，对报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等热门专业持续高热，华中师大相关专业（计算机 类、电子信息类）受益于行业热度；本省2026年考生总数110868人，按历史比例估算物理类约79825人，较2025年80421人略减，竞争压力基本持平。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category/Science were approximately 15646 → 9678 → 8408 → 12216 → 12132. Rankings notably moved forward in 2022–2023 but fell back to around 12000 in 2024–2025, stabilizing in recent two years. The 2025 baseline is about 12132. Provincial Physics Category enrollment plans: 34 in 2021, 28 in 2022, 30 in 2023, 23 in 2024, 23 in 2025; 2026 plan is 14, a sharp reduction of about 39% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition and expected to notably move rankings forward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Tier and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking 2026 approximately 53rd, slightly up from 2025 (56th), stable in 46–58 range in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat positive, mainly due to positive events like an 81-year-old PhD graduate from CCNU; Douyin popularity ranking 89th (average), no notable admission cutoff gaps recorded; Education A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-, strong teacher-training disciplines, strongly attractive for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Hot majors like Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remain highly popular; related majors at CCNU (Computer Science, Electronic Information) benefit from industry trends; provincial total examinees in 2026: 110868, estimated Physics Category about 79825 based on historical proportion, slightly down from 80425 in 2025, competition pressure roughly unchanged.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining 2025 baseline ranking 12132, sharp 39% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, rising Soft Science ranking and somewhat positive reputation, rankings are expected to notably move forward; predicted minimum ranking about 9234, range 8734–9734.

- Chemistry (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, etc.)

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)

- Law
- Information Resource Management
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Central China Normal University's Physics Category significantly reduces enrollment, rankings are expected to notably move forward. For rankings within the predicted range (8734–9734), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety; for rankings significantly better than the lower bound, prioritize Computer Science, Mathematics and other hot majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 1287 → 2449 → 1577 → 1641 → 1493. In 2022, there was a significant backward shift, but from 2023 to 2025, it gradually moved forward and stabilized around 1500. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1493. The provincial history category enrollment plan was 14 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 8, unchanged from 2025, with enrollment scale at a recent low.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Project 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking approximately 53rd in 2026, slightly up from 56th in 2025, with recent rankings stable in the 46–58 range. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly due to positive events such as an 81-year-old doctoral graduate from CCNU. Douyin popularity ranking is 89th (average), with no obvious admission cutoff gaps. Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Political Science A-, Marxist Theory A-. Majors such as History, Political Science, and Education directly correspond to advantageous disciplines, offering strong appeal.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Normal/education majors were assessed as divergent and wait-and-see in 2024, but ministry-affiliated normal universities have clear advantages. In 2026, the total number of provincial examinees is 110,868, with an estimated history category of about 31,077 based on historical proportions, essentially unchanged from 31,071 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1493, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the rise in Soft Science ranking, and the generally positive reputation, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1508, with a range of 1237–1779.
